Patient Safety Movement Foundation.specific_ask_text: Grants that align with PSMF core values and mission, particularly healthcare education and patient safety.

Retirement Housing Foundation.specific_ask_text: Gap financing for multifamily projects in Dekalb County GA, Clark County NV, Utah, Phoenix AZ, Riverside CA.

Senior Network Services.specific_ask_text: Open to partnerships and contract opportunities for senior and disability services.

Friendship Circle SD.specific_ask_text: TWO PRIORITIES: (1) Vocational training bakery employing people with special needs (~$100k expansion), (2) Future community center building serving families with special needs.

ask_2.description: Future community center building serving families with special needs

Highland Lakes Family Crisis Center.specific_ask_text: Only emergency shelter serving four Texas counties (Blanco, Burnet, Lampasas, Llano).
